channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: FairPrice 50% Off Andersen’s of Denmark Ice-Cream & More for Link Members Until 29 Jul 2026
item.description: Half-price savings on selected groceries, seafood, fruit and ice cream

item.title: Scoot x DBS/POSB Enjoy 20% Off Flights to Over 40 Destinations, Book by 27 Jul 2026
item.description: Save 20% on selected Scoot fares

item.title: Smöoy Singapore 1-for-1 Classic Cup on 24 July 2026
item.description: Celebrate with a refreshing 1-for-1 Classic Cup deal

item.title: Giant S’pore 3-for-$25 Ben & Jerry’s, 38% off KA And More Weekly Deals Till 29 Jul 2026
item.description: Stock up on grocery bargains

item.title: Istana Open House on Sunday, 26 Jul 2026
item.description: For the first time, an evening outdoor concert will be held

item.title: BreadTalk S’pore 6 Buns for $10.80 Promotion Until 26 July 2026
item.description: Enjoy six favourite buns for one great value price

item.title: OCBC S’pore Fixed Deposit Promo Rates Up To 1.3% p.a. from 22 Jul 2026
item.description: Lock in up to 1.30% p.a. with S$20,000 through OCBC branches or digital banking.

item.title: Swensen’s FREE Side, Sundae or Drink with selected Main Dish order on weekdays 11am to 2pm (from 10 July 2026)
item.description: Complimentary side, sundae or drink with selected mains during weekday lunch

item.title: Namecheap Up to 97% Off Domains & Web Hosting Summer Sale till 27 July 2026
item.description: Save on domains, hosting, email, SSL and more with limited-time online offers.

item.title: Kenangan Coffee S’pore Buy 1 Get 1 Free Coffee Payday Promo from 22-24 July 2026
item.description: Buy one Regular coffee via the app and receive another of the same flavour free

item.title: Maybank S’pore SGD Time Deposit Promotion offers up to 1.45% p.a. from 22 Jul 2026
item.description: Lock in up to 1.45% p.a. across six, nine or 12-month Singapore dollar placements.

item.title: LiHO Tea S’pore Buy 1 Get 1 Free Selected Cheese Cloud Teas until 23 July 2026
item.description: Double up on two selected Cheese Cloud teas
